description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 28 (Tuesday), Hanno Rotary Club presented a donation to be used for environmental education programs for elementary and junior high school students.

Since fiscal year 2022 (Reiwa 4), the club has made similar donations. In fiscal years 2022 and 2024 (Reiwa 4 and 6), we used the funds to purchase environmental learning materials for Hanno municipal elementary schools. In fiscal years 2023 and 2025 (Reiwa 5 and 7), we used them for Hanno municipal junior high schools.

We will put this latest donation to good use in keeping with the club's intentions.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13514.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Receipt of donation from Hanno Rotary Club
